response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify Hanamaki Raden's performance of two songs. 2. Identified 'Laser Beam' by Nakata Yasutaka (performed by Perfume) via on-screen credits and verified with search. 3. Identified 'Debayashi Japonism' by Yuki Honda (Arte Refact) via on-screen credits as Hanamaki Raden's original song and verified with search. 4. Conducted searches for complete lyrics for both songs. 5. Mapped performance times to scene timestamps and compiled the JSON data.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a 3D concert performance by the VTuber Hanamaki Raden, showcasing a new outfit, performing 'Laser Beam' by Perfume and her original song 'Debayashi Japonism'.

scenes.description: The performer Hanamaki Raden greets the audience and prepares for her performance, signaling a change in her outfit.
Hanamaki Raden performs 'Laser Beam'. The scene includes stage lighting effects and graphical elements like cubes.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Straight, heart pounding, your gaze is like a laser beam. Piercing my heart with a swoosh, a rainbow-colored love beam. Ripe fruit bouncing off water, sparkling, resembling light. Your figure standing on the ground is so dazzling, it makes me blush a bit. Straight, you're so direct. Love is definitely a laser beam, piercing my heart with a swoosh, a rainbow-colored love beam. The secret light that connects us, the secret light we found that day. The moment of love, the sound stops, and time goes slowly, a love beam of light. Straight, heart pounding, your gaze is like a laser beam. Piercing my heart with a swoosh, a rainbow-colored love beam. Straight, you're so direct. Love is definitely a laser beam, piercing my heart with a swoosh, a rainbow-colored love beam.

scenes.description: A brief transitional period where the performer makes a final adjustment to her outfit before continuing.
Hanamaki Raden performs her original song 'Debayashi Japonism'. The background displays traditional Japanese aesthetics, and she uses a stylized staff prop.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Step right up, come take a look! HiHi! Hi! Curiosity that never ends, touching on the splendor of Japonism. The rising star of the Reiwa era, we shall deliver it to everyone. Passion in eloquence, overflowing with the love I want to convey. Knowing that we know nothing will surely become a wonderful beginning. (More) I want you to know (more), taste it until you've had your fill. (Thoroughly) Precious (thoroughly) life, unraveled history, my heart is drawn to it. Far away, riding the airwaves to reach you! I want to convey this feeling purely! A brand new world, I'll show it to you! First things first, let's get it started! Breaking the mold in an unprecedented way, we build! A monumental punchline, crossing through time! Riding on the entrance music, step right up, come take a look. A life embracing romance, let's bet it all and go wild with style. Footprints of living in the moment, together with the great predecessors. Cutting the stylish fuse, the abyss of performing arts beckons to us. Conflicting emotions, moving you beyond love and hate. Far away, crossing the world to the universe! I want to deliver this feeling endlessly! Oriental! Occidental! Loving them both! The impulse stirs and accelerates! Diving into the world of creation, riding on a witty short story, step right up, come take a look. The feelings of the human world passed down, snuggling close to your heart. Pleasure-seeking, chic and dashing, how about a way of life like that? Far away, riding the airwaves to reach you! I want to convey this feeling purely! A brand new world, I'll show it to you! First things first, let's get it started! Breaking the mold in an unprecedented way, we build! A monumental punchline, crossing through time! Riding on the entrance music, step right up, come take a look. Step right up, come take a look!
